name: pi-repo-baby
description: Repository map generator for Pi — gives the agent structural awareness of any codebase via Tree-sitter
author: k2-888

scripts.install-deps: python3 -m venv venv --clear && ./venv/bin/pip install tree-sitter tree-sitter-python tree-sitter-javascript tree-sitter-typescript tree-sitter-yaml tree-sitter-json tree-sitter-go tree-sitter-rust tree-sitter-ruby tree-sitter-java tree-sitter-c tree-sitter-cpp tree-sitter-c-sharp tree-sitter-php tree-sitter-kotlin tree-sitter-swift tree-sitter-scala tree-sitter-bash tree-sitter-sql tree-sitter-lua tree-sitter-html tree-sitter-css tree-sitter-toml tree-sitter-elixir tree-sitter-haskell tree-sitter-markdown tree-sitter-hcl
